name: Intent Tagger
description: Classify each scraped page by content type using LLM classification against user-defined intents. Helps downstream steps prioritize and route content for creation.
usage_notes: Uses LLM to classify pages against your defined intent categories. Edit the intents list to match your content creation goals. Each page gets a single intent label + confidence score. Priority intents are sorted to the top.

options.name: intents
options.label: Intent categories (one per line: name | description)
options.description: Define the intent categories for classification. Format: name | description. The description helps the LLM understand what qualifies. 'other' is always added automatically as a catch-all.
options.default:
news | Breaking news, announcements, industry updates, regulatory changes
product_info | Product pages, feature descriptions, specifications, platform details
press_release | Official company press releases and media statements
review | Reviews, comparisons, ratings, player feedback, operator assessments
faq | Frequently asked questions, help pages, knowledge base articles
guide | How-to guides, tutorials, educational content, strategy articles
opinion | Opinion pieces, editorials, analysis, commentary, thought leadership
media | Image galleries, videos, infographics, podcasts, visual content
statistics | Data, research, reports, market analysis, rankings, surveys
event | Conference coverage, trade show news, event recaps, webinar summaries
regulation | Legal updates, licensing, compliance, responsible gambling policies
interview | Interviews, Q&A sessions, executive profiles, panel discussions

options.name: priority_intents
options.label: Priority intents (comma-separated)
options.description: Intents to sort first in the output. Pages matching these intents appear at the top of results for each entity.

options.name: ai_model
options.label: AI model
options.description: Which model to use for classification.

options.name: ai_provider
options.label: AI provider
options.description: Which provider to use for classification.

options_defaults.intents:
news | Breaking news, announcements, industry updates, regulatory changes
product_info | Product pages, feature descriptions, specifications, platform details
press_release | Official company press releases and media statements
review | Reviews, comparisons, ratings, player feedback, operator assessments
faq | Frequently asked questions, help pages, knowledge base articles
